text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm done shopping, it's time to go
train—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my glasses! I can't run with them slipping off
so easily like this. I'd better get them adjusted.

text_block_list.name: Optometrist
text_block_list.text:
How do they feel now? I tightened them to be
more suitable for running.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I came to a shop that specializes in
sportswear. You were so fast, I should be able to
make it back in time for... Wait.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but they're a bit tight. Could you loosen
the hinges a little, please?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ack... Now they feel strange against my nose! I
think the height of the nose pads needs to be—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's already time for training... But I can't
focus like this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In fact, my training efficiency will surely drop if I
try to ignore the problem.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And that will negatively affect my actual race
performance!

text_block_list.name: Optometrist
text_block_list.text:
Um... So would you like me to make another
adjustment?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Ensuring my glasses are properly fitted and
then making up the lost training time afterwards
is the most efficient course of action!
Biwa Hayahide ends up skipping training...
